title: Open the app and navigate to the 'Capture Your Progress' screen
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the 'Capture Your Progress' screen
expected_result: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed

title: Click on the menu icon in the header
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the menu icon in the header | Verify that the menu options are displayed

title: Click on the help icon in the header
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the help icon in the header | Verify that the help information is displayed

title: Click on the 'Before' section
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the 'Before' section | Verify that the 'Before' section is selected

title: Click on the 'After' section
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the 'After' section | Verify that the 'After' section is selected

title: Click on the 'Old You' label
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the 'Old You' label | Verify that the 'Old You' label is selected

title: Click on the 'New You' label
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the 'New You' label | Verify that the 'New You' label is selected

title: Click on the 'Old You' image
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the 'Old You' image | Verify that the 'Old You' image is selected

title: Click on the 'New You' image
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the 'New You' image | Verify that the 'New You' image is selected

title: Click on the 'Old You' and 'New You' labels simultaneously
preconditions: The 'Capture Your Progress' screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the 'Old You' label | Click on the 'New You' label | Verify that both labels are selected
